root_text.sn46.51:1.2: “Pañcannañca, bhikkhave, nīvaraṇānaṁ sattannañca bojjhaṅgānaṁ āhārañca anāhārañca desessāmi;
root_text.sn46.51:1.4: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:1.7: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:2.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:2.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:3.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:3.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, arati tandi vijambhitā bhattasammado cetaso ca līnattaṁ.
root_text.sn46.51:3.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:4.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:4.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:5.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:5.4: ayamāhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:6.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:6.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:7.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:7.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, kusalākusalā dhammā sāvajjānavajjā dhammā hīnapaṇītā dhammā kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāgā dhammā.
root_text.sn46.51:7.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:8.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:8.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:9.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:9.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:10.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:10.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:11.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:11.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:12.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:12.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:13.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:13.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:14.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:14.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:15.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:15.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:16.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:16.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:17.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.51:17.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, kusalākusalā dhammā sāvajjānavajjā dhammā hīnapaṇītā dhammā kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāgā dhammā.
root_text.sn46.51:17.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.51:18.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:18.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:19.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:19.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, kusalākusalā dhammā sāvajjānavajjā dhammā hīnapaṇītā dhammā kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāgā dhammā.
root_text.sn46.51:19.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:20.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:20.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:21.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:21.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:22.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:22.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:23.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:23.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.51:24.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, anāhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.51:24.4: ayamanāhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā”ti.

translation_text.sn46.51:1.2: “Mendicants, I will teach you what fuels and what starves the five hindrances and the seven awakening factors.
translation_text.sn46.51:1.4: And what fuels the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.51:1.5: There is the feature of beauty.
translation_text.sn46.51:1.6: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:1.7: fuels the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.51:2.1: And what fuels the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.51:2.2: There is the feature of harshness.
translation_text.sn46.51:2.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:2.4: fuels the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.51:3.1: And what fuels the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.51:3.2: There is discontent, sloth, yawning, sleepiness after eating, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.sn46.51:3.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:3.4: fuels the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.51:4.1: And what fuels the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.51:4.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:4.4: fuels the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.51:5.1: And what fuels the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.51:5.2: There are things that are grounds for doubt.
translation_text.sn46.51:5.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:5.4: fuels the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.51:6.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:6.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of mindfulness.
translation_text.sn46.51:6.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:6.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:7.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:7.2: There are qualities that are skillful and unskillful, blameworthy and blameless, inferior and superior, and those on the side of dark and bright.
translation_text.sn46.51:7.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:7.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:8.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:8.2: There are the elements of initiative, persistence, and exertion.
translation_text.sn46.51:8.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:8.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:9.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:9.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of rapture.
translation_text.sn46.51:9.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:9.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:10.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:10.2: There is tranquility of the body and of the mind.
translation_text.sn46.51:10.3: Frequent rational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:10.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:11.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:11.2: There are things that are the basis of serenity and freedom from distraction.
translation_text.sn46.51:11.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:11.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:12.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.51:12.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.51:12.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:12.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.51:13.1: And what starves the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth?
translation_text.sn46.51:13.2: There is the feature of ugliness.
translation_text.sn46.51:13.3: Frequent rational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:13.4: starves the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth.
translation_text.sn46.51:14.1: And what starves the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth?
translation_text.sn46.51:14.2: There is the heart’s release by love.
translation_text.sn46.51:14.3: Frequent rational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:14.4: starves the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth.
translation_text.sn46.51:15.1: And what starves the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, starves their increase and growth?
translation_text.sn46.51:15.2: There are the elements of initiative, persistence, and exertion.
translation_text.sn46.51:15.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:15.4: starves the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, starves their increase and growth.
translation_text.sn46.51:16.1: And what starves the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, starves their increase and growth?
translation_text.sn46.51:16.3: Frequent rational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:16.4: starves the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, starves their increase and growth.
translation_text.sn46.51:17.1: And what starves the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth?
translation_text.sn46.51:17.2: There are qualities that are skillful and unskillful, blameworthy and blameless, inferior and superior, and those on the side of dark and bright.
translation_text.sn46.51:17.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.51:17.4: starves the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, starves its increase and growth.
translation_text.sn46.51:18.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:18.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of mindfulness.
translation_text.sn46.51:18.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:18.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:19.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:19.2: There are qualities that are skillful and unskillful, blameworthy and blameless, inferior and superior, and those on the side of dark and bright.
translation_text.sn46.51:19.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:19.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:20.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:20.2: There are the elements of initiative, persistence, and exertion.
translation_text.sn46.51:20.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:20.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:21.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:21.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of rapture.
translation_text.sn46.51:21.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:21.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:22.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:22.2: There is tranquility of the body and of the mind.
translation_text.sn46.51:22.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:22.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:23.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:23.2: There are things that are the basis of serenity and freedom from distraction.
translation_text.sn46.51:23.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:23.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.
translation_text.sn46.51:24.1: And what starves the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development?
translation_text.sn46.51:24.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.51:24.3: Not frequently applying the mind to that
translation_text.sn46.51:24.4: starves the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, starves its full development.”
